feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Demystifying DXaaS: Accelerating Digital Transformation with KTern.AI
entry.content:
Demystifying DXaaS: Accelerating Digital Transformation with KTern.AI

In this log post, we’ll delve into the complexities of digital transformation, explore how KTern.AI excels in automating this journey, and showcase a real-world case study that highlights the impact of KTern.AI’s services

In today’s rapidly evolving business landscape, digital transformation is no longer a luxury—it’s a necessity. Organizations across industries are embracing technology to streamline processes, enhance customer experiences, and stay competitive. Enter Digital Transformation as a Service (DXaaS), a powerful approach that combines automation, intelligence, and expertise to drive meaningful change.

The Integration Challenge: A Roadblock to DX Success

 

One of the biggest hurdles in any DX initiative is system integration. Businesses often have a complex IT landscape with disparate systems housing critical data. Integrating these systems to create a unified platform for streamlined operations, data analysis, and automation can be a time-consuming and resource-intensive process. Traditional approaches often involve:

  • High upfront costs: Investing in hardware, software, and specialized IT personnel for integration projects.
  • Lengthy implementation times: Manual configuration and testing of integrations can significantly delay the realization of DX benefits.
  • Increased risk of errors: Complex integrations require meticulous planning and execution, and even minor errors can disrupt operations.

The Energy-Intensive Journey: SAP Integration and Transformation

SAP integration and transformation involve intricate processes, data migrations, and custom code adaptations. These endeavors can be energy-consuming due to several factors:

  1. Legacy Systems: Integrating legacy systems with modern SAP solutions requires meticulous planning and execution. The energy spent on bridging the gap between old and new technologies can be substantial.
  2. Data Complexity: Migrating data from various sources—ERP systems, databases, spreadsheets—demands significant computational resources. Ensuring data integrity and consistency adds to the energy overhead.
  3. Custom Code Modifications: Aligning existing custom code with SAP’s evolving landscape involves careful analysis and adjustments. Each modification consumes time and effort.
  4. Process Mapping: Understanding existing business processes and mapping them to SAP’s best practices can be resource-intensive. Energy is expended in process discovery, documentation, and alignment.
  5. Change Management: Transformations impact people, and managing change requires communication, training, and support. Energy is spent in navigating resistance and ensuring smooth transitions.

Ktern.AI: Automating DX with Expertise and Innovation

This is where Ktern.AI, a leading player in the Kaar Technologies ecosystem, steps in. They leverage their expertise in SAP solutions and a suite of innovative products and

services to automate your DX journey, specifically addressing the integration challenge. Here's how Ktern.AI excels:

  • Pre-built Integration Connectors: Ktern.AI offers pre-configured connectors that seamlessly integrate your existing SAP systems with other applications, eliminating the need for custom coding and saving valuable time.
  • Low-Code Development Platforms: Their low-code development platforms empower businesses to build custom integrations without extensive programming knowledge, democratizing the integration process.
  • Automation Tools and Robotic Process Automation (RPA): Ktern.AI utilizes automation tools and RPA to streamline repetitive integration tasks, minimizing human error and ensuring efficiency.

KTern.AI: Your Energy-Efficient DXaaS Partner

KTern.AI stands at the forefront of DXaaS, offering an AI-driven platform that accelerates SAP digital transformations while minimizing energy consumption. Here’s how KTern.AI excels:

  1. Generative AI: KTern.AI leverages generative AI to build an intelligent enterprise. From assessing SAP processes to creating roadmaps, it empowers organizations with data-driven insights, reducing manual effort.
  2. No-Code Automation: With KTern.AI, you don’t need to be a developer. Its no-code approach allows business users to automate processes, saving energy by eliminating complex coding tasks.
  3. Clean Core Strategy: KTern.AI follows SAP’s Clean Core Strategy, minimizing custom code adaptations during upgrades. This approach reduces energy spent on code maintenance.
  4. Comprehensive Streams: KTern.AI covers five critical automation streams:
  • Digital Maps: Assess SAP processes, identify energy-intensive areas, and create transformation roadmaps
  • Digital Projects: Govern SAP projects efficiently, optimizing energy usage through streamlined collaboration and signoff workflows
  • Digital Process: Orchestrate SAP processes with minimal custom code adaptations, conserving energy while ensuring efficiency
  • Digital Labs: Optimize testing, reduce energy-intensive test cycles, and enhance reliability.
  • Digital Mines: Avoid business disruptions during releases, optimizing energy usage in SAP DevOps
 
 

 

 

Case Study: How Ktern.AI Helped a Manufacturing Giant Streamline Operations

A leading manufacturing company faced significant challenges due to disconnected systems and manual data entry processes. Ktern.AI implemented a DXaaS solution that included:

  • Integrating their SAP ERP system with production machinery and warehouse management systems.
  • Utilizing pre-built connectors and low-code development platforms to automate data flow.
  • Deploying RPA bots to handle repetitive tasks like order processing and inventory updates.

A Sustainable Transformation

Let’s explore a real-world case study. A global enterprise faced an energy challenge during its SAP S/4HANA migration. KTern.AI stepped in:

  1. Assessment: KTern.AI conducted a rapid assessment, identifying energy-intensive processes and areas.
  2. Governance: Using the Activate cockpit, the company achieved productive governance, minimizing energy waste.
  3. Orchestration: KTern.AI orchestrated processes, adapting custom code judiciously to conserve energy.
  4. Testing Excellence: The Fiori test auto-captures and defect management ensured efficient testing without unnecessary energy expenditure.
  5. Risk-Free Release: The enterprise achieved a risk-free SAP release, saving energy and maintaining business continuity

Results:

  • Reduced integration time by 60% compared to traditional methods.
  • Eliminated manual data entry errors leading to improved data accuracy.
  • Achieved a 20% increase in operational efficiency.

Embrace a Seamless DX Journey with Ktern.AI

Don't let integration complexities hinder your digital transformation journey. Leverage the power of DXaaS and Ktern.AI's automation expertise to streamline your integrations, unlock data silos, and achieve operational excellence.

Ready to take the first step? Contact Ktern.AI today and let them guide you towards a successful and automated digital transformation.

By embracing DXaaS and partnering with Ktern.AI, you can unlock the full potential of your SAP landscape and propel your business towards a thriving future.

entry.title: S4HC Adding Logic to Custom Business Objects
entry.content:
I've been following along with the tutorial on Implement Logic for a Custom Business Object 

In there they say to implement additional logic for After Modification and Before Save  - and as per the SAP Help

But is there some trick to getting this code to execute on the create event when using the application ?.  My published application has the actioned as actions links on the menu bar instead that I need to click on.  I want to create a record and for it to automatically trigger them on those events and I don't want those 2 to appear on the menu bar.

entry.title: Need city field as mandatory in delivery address tab in purchase order.
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to know if we can make city field as mandatory before saving the PO in S/4HANA Public Cloud. 

Thanks

Simran

entry.title: I want to select all entries coming in my RAP application.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am creating a GSTR1 report by using RAP in SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud, 

My application is working fine but when I am clicking on select all button to send the data to another portal then only initial entries( ex- 120 entries got selected ) are got selected only, but in my application i have 600+ entries.

I want to select all the coming entries in my GSTR1 application.

Please suggest how to acheive the same.

Thanks for your support.

 

SAP BTP, ABAP environment ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model RISE with SAP SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility

entry.title: I want to Export/download all the data of my GSTR1 RAP application in Excel sheet.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am creating a GSTR1 report by using RAP in SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud, 

My application is working fine but when I am exporting my data into Excel then I will get the exact count of lines.

But the data is not exported correctly in excel, because when I am trying to filter my excel with a particular invoice then the data is not available in excel for the same invoice 

but I have the same data in my GSTR1 application.

I am using RAP's standard export functionality( which is coming by default in RAP ) for the same.

Thanks for your support.

entry.title: How to add a link from plan customer project app to navigate to the project Controller app
entry.content:
Good day,

We are trying to add a link from within the plan customer projects app to navigate directly to the Project Control - Professional Services Projects app for the project being worked on. Is it possible to add the link to the related apps selection on plan customer projects:

Are we able to add the link from the billing tab to navigate to the Project Control - Professional Services Projects for the project being worked on?

The Project Control - Professional Services Projects app already has a link to the plan customer projects app thus trying to achieve the same from plan customer projects to Project Control - Professional Services Projects:

Please advise on possible solutions to add a link from within the plan customer projects app to navigate directly to the Project Control - Professional Services Projects app.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud for projects 

Regards

Haaroon

entry.title: About using custom fonts in custom form templates
entry.content:
I would like to know how to set a custom font in a custom template using the "Embed PDF" property.
I have already uploaded the custom font to Adobe Document Services (ADS). It is also installed on my Windows machine.
Are there any restrictions on custom fonts?

I would also like to know how to set a custom form template in a specified report.

Thank you in advance.

SAP Forms service by Adobe 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility 

NW ABAP Print and Output Management

entry.title: Custom field type Quantity with Unit
entry.content:
Hello,

we need to create a custom field in sales document header and fill it with total weight of the sales order to display this field in app Manage sales orders.

A few monthes ago we already created a similar custom field at sales document item level and filled it with gross weight of the item. This custom field was created with type Quantity with Unit.

We would like to use the same type for the custom field at header level in order to remain consistent. However, we don't know which would be the length of a custom field created with this type and were not able to find this information in SAP support or documentation. So, we are wondering if there is any risk that the total weight of an order will exceed the length of the field?

Thanks for your answers.

Aurélie

entry.title: If import parameter was not available in BADI, how can I get the parameter in s/4 hana public cloud?
entry.content:
The business requirement is to get the last purchase price and date in a "supplier quotation" or "Request for quotation" applications for a material. 

For this we have written the query using CDS views are I_PurchaseOrderItemAPI01 and I_PurchaseOrderAPI01.

We found the BADI for RFQ is "MM_PUR_S4_RFQ_MODIFY_ITEM" 

we don't have material as import parameter in the above BADI.

 

Please suggest for the solution..

Thanks in advance..

entry.title: Business Catalog for SSCUI Activity
entry.content:
Hello,

I just would like to know which business catalog is necessary for Define Plant App in Business Process Configuration in SAP CBC. Where can I look up the required business catalog for missing authorization?

Thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Custom Business Object - Assign UI App to Developed Business Catalog
entry.content:
Hi,

We have developed several CBO's and then we have created Business Catalogs using developer extensibility.

Is it possible to add these CBOs to the developed Business Catalogs?

Kind regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Is there any difference in the APIs between S/4HANA Cloud and S/4HANA onPremise?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are using API to integrate with S/4HANA Cloud. We also want to use the same code to support S/4HANA onPremise. So here we want to confirm with you, is there any difference in the APIs between Cloud and On-Prem?

Thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Custom CDS view authorizations
entry.content:
Hello SAP Team,

How can we set authorization to custom CDS views created via app  “Custom CDS Views” in SAP public cloud edition?

Thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Seeking Guidance on Mapping Screens to Fields in SAP S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I am new to the SAP S/4 HANA world and trying to transition into the technical field. My background is in SAP B1, where SAP provides excellent documentation that helps map screens to tables and fields.

In SAP S/4 HANA, I am finding it challenging to understand the mapping process. For example, if I have a specific screen, how can I identify the fields that might be mapped to either custom CDS views or public endpoints?

I am feeling a bit lost and would greatly appreciate your support and guidance on this matter.

entry.title: Purchase Requisition Email Notification template setting
entry.content:
Is that possible to send email notification after Purchase Requisition creation?

Is there any documentation that describe specific steps to use standard email template?

 

Best Regards,

KhaingZin

entry.title: ABAP RAP: Execute Business Object Interface from action
entry.content:
Hi community,

A common request from customers is that a report execute a certain process and if one of the process "fail" not continue with the others process. In S/4HANA Public Cloud, the replacement for BAPI's are the Local APIs (Business Object Interfaces - BOI) for example I_MaterialDocumentTP. Only for reference, this example is obtained from the standard Knowledge Transfer Document. In theory, the REPORTED structure must return messages in case of an error occurs, but that is not the case.

    MODIFY ENTITIES OF i_materialdocumenttp
             ENTITY MaterialDocument
             CREATE FROM VALUE #( ( %cid                          = 'CID_001'
                                    goodsmovementcode             = '01'
                                    postingdate                   = '31129999'
                                    documentdate                  = '31129999'
                                    %control-goodsmovementcode                    = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                    %control-postingdate                          = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                    %control-documentdate                         = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                ) )
             ENTITY MaterialDocument
             CREATE BY \_MaterialDocumentItem
             FROM VALUE #( (
                             %cid_ref = 'CID_001'
                             %target = VALUE #( ( %cid                           = 'CID_ITM_001'
                                                  plant                          = '1010'
                                                  material                       = 'RAW_MATERIAL_01'
                                                  GoodsMovementType              = '501'
                                                  storagelocation                = '101A'
                                                  QuantityInEntryUnit            = 1
                                                  entryunit                      = 'ST'
                                                  %control-plant                 = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                                  %control-material              = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                                  %control-GoodsMovementType     = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                                  %control-storagelocation       = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                                  %control-QuantityInEntryUnit   = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                                  %control-entryunit             = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                              ) )

                                               
                         ) )
             MAPPED   DATA(ls_create_mapped)
             FAILED   DATA(ls_create_failed)
             REPORTED DATA(ls_create_reported).

 The "errors" only are obtained when the COMMIT ENTITIES in the REPORTED structure.

COMMIT ENTITIES
  RESPONSE OF i_materialdocumenttp
  FAILED DATA(commit_failed)
  REPORTED DATA(commit_reported).

 Of course, in the context of ABAP RAP, the use of COMMIT is not supported.

If I'm developing an application with ABAP RAP and I have an action that need to create a material document and report if an error occurs, who could I achieve that?

I know the existence of different methods of "asynchronous code execution" (app. jobs, bgPF and events), if this is the only way... what could be the best option to report/show to the user that material document is processing in background and when the process ends show the errors or the new document created?

entry.title: Adding a Value Help for a Standard field in Custom Business Object
entry.content:
Hi Members,

I've created a Custom business object with standard fields in it and one of the field needs a value help which is added by Association to Business Object. I tried referring to a blog 

Adding a Value Help for Custom Business Object fie... - SAP Community

But after following the steps mentioned in it, the value help is not providing any value.

Could anyone help in explaining on how to achieve this

@Cloud @ABAP

entry.title: Assistance Required: Retrieving Business Partner Full Name in S/4 Hana Public Edition via SO API
entry.content:
Dear All

I'm currently retrieving Sales Order details from the S/4 Hana Public Edition System. While utilizing the $expand parameter, I'm able to access linked Business Partner Details. However, I'm encountering an issue where the Business Partner Full Name field isn't present in the response. Could anyone guide me on how to include this field?

SAP S/4 HANA Business Partner Details - C00002 & the Business Partner Full Name is URBAN OUTFITTERS WHOLESALE INC.

Sales Order API Response with using $Expand To_Partner - https://xxx.com/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_SALES_ORDER_SRV/A_SalesOrder('B2C0700004')?$expand=to_Partner

Business Partner API Response as an Example

Please help.

entry.title: Why is a Code List based on Custom CDS View not working in Display/Change Maintenance Order Page?
entry.content:
I have created and added a Custom Field that is of type Code List based on CDS View.

The Primary Data source for this Custom CDS View is based off a Custom Business Object.

The Scenario of this Custom CDS View is "Value Help". 

I have successfully published all the above components, however upon adding the Custom Field in the Maintenance Order Page (Display/ Change) thru Adapt UI, it remains to display as a Text Field instead of an option to open the Code List.

entry.title: API API_MATERIAL_DOCUMENT throwing 'Provide Line-IDs' error during a POST call with Custom Fields
entry.content:
Hi Community ,

I have created a custom field with Business Context as 'Material Document Item' in Custom Fields App in SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud . I have enabled it for ODATA Service API_MATERIAL_DOCUMENT_SRV and at GUI level it is disabled.

When i do a GET call at Header Level (Extending to Line Item) using API Material Documents - Read, Create ; it successfully gives me the Material Document details with header and line items(along with the created custom fields). But when i do a POST call for posting a material document by putting custom fields in to the Payload, i get an error message saying 'Provide line ID's when using Business Context MATERIALDOCUMENTITEM'.

POST call works fine if i remove the custom field.

Attached screenshots of Successful GET Call with Custom fields, payload Used for POST call and Error message during POST call.

Please suggest me a solution to resolve above mentioned issue.
